settings.description:
Garrison is a luxury apartment community that embodies modern living in one of Orange County’s most vibrant neighborhoods. With curated amenities and a location near Angel Stadium and the Honda Center, Garrison balances stay-at-home comfort with access to everything the city offers.

Creative Mines partnered with the development and design teams to help define the project’s architectural identity. The multi-story elevations are clad in Raincloud Warehouse Brick, a material selected for its cool tonal range, modern industrial texture, and durability in urban environments. The result — a bold, contemporary façade that reflects both high design and everyday livability.
